caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a green baseball cap is seated at a desk, speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with racks of clothes and banners in the background. One banner reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS," and another displays the logo "VRM VISUAL REALITY MEDIA." In the background, another person wearing a blue tracksuit is partially visible. On the desk in front of the man is a sign with text that includes "OUT," "CONNEC," and "TH U!". To the left, a small logo contains the text "97". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, gesturing slightly with his hand as he speaks into the microphone, while the overall composition of the scene remains static.
